In fact, before we did this launch of this product, I took the six hours of training that you're about to go through. I sent them to all my top clients, people in my inner circle. Now my inner circle, they pay $50,000 a year to be part of this group. And I said, I want you guys to go through this as a beta group. I wanna get your feedback and I wanna see how it affects you. And so I gave this to all of them. And what was amazing is, these are people who've been in my world. They've studied the way I do my presentations and a lot of them are actually doing webinars right now. And the feedback was amazing. People were like, oh my gosh, I finally understand how these pieces work together. And why you did that? And I started watching over the next few months as they took that information and started tweaking their presentations. And we saw this huge increase in sales. And for almost every one of them and almost every market you can dream of. So I'm excited to see what you do with it. Some of you guys, you're just beginning and this is gonna be the framework to create the presentations to sell your products and your services. Some of you guys are already having success. You're looking for those little tweaks that have the huge impact on your bottom line. I promise you, you're gonna get that. Now, the interesting thing is, I gave my inner circle members the training. One of the biggest questions I got back afterwards from a lot of them were like, Russ, where did you learn this stuff from? Like this is not, this is the dead art and nobody does this anymore. And you're the only one doing it. Like how in the world did you initially learn this? If you didn't just figure it out, did you just like discover it? I started thinking back like, how did I learn this? Who are the mentors that I learned from? Way back in the day when I first started trying to learn how to speak from stage. And I started looking back and I made a list of who are all the people. I remember I made the list of like, who was the person that taught me how to tell stories to break false beliefs during my presentation. So by the end, people were ready to buy. Who was the person that taught me trial closes? Who the person that taught me the price marinade and the repitch? Who taught me the stack? Who taught me about false belief patterns? And who taught me about microcloses? And I started going through this and I remembered who all the original mentors were that I learned from. I thought, you know, I'm gonna get these guys on a phone. I'm gonna pick their brains. I started interviewing all of them out. What they did and how they did it. It was fascinating because I thought I understood trial closes, but as I interviewed the guy who invented this whole concept, they literally call him the Pied Piper. Like if you watch videos of him, it's insane. You see him back 10 years ago. He beat these big events and there would be a line of people, four, five, 600 people following him to the back of the room with their credit cards in hand, holding like waving above their heads. And they just call him the Pied Piper because he could literally get an entire audience to stand up and follow him to the back of the room. The person I learned the stack from, like stack alone has made me more money than any concept I've ever learned in the history of my business. I learned it from one guy. So I'm interviewing all these people because I wanna learn like the closing tactics again so I can share these things with you. And then one of the calls changed everything. And this is what's fascinating. What I wanna share with you. One of the calls was with a guy named John Childers. Now John retired from public speaking training about 10 years ago, but John is the one who initially trained everybody, they trained me, trained most of my mentors on how to speak from stage. And as I'm interviewing John for this program, I'm going deeper and deeper. He started talking about this concept. He calls Childers chunks. I'm not gonna go too deep into what it is other than if you ever wonder how I get, most of you guys wanna buy my thing before I ever get to the end, because of Childers chunks. It's one of the most powerful concepts in speaking in the world. And nobody even said that word for over a decade. But I remember that I started asking about Childers chunks and how they work and get him to reteach it to me. And eventually I was like, as he was teaching me this concept, I said, man, I remember back in the day I actually bought the course Childers chunks. And he sold it for $25,000 if he came to the live event where he taught it. And it was about, it was more than five figures if you were to go buy the course. I spent over $10,000 on the course back in the day. And I remember asking him, I was like, is there any way like I could give this course to everyone? Cause like this course is like, it's the key. And he's like, I don't sell it anymore. I'm retired. And I said, but this is the thing like when I learned these Childers chunks, like each chunk is a story that you can plug into any presentation. It doesn't matter if you're selling real estate or information. If you're selling stock market or weight loss, like these Childers chunks are stories you can weave into any presentation that knocked down all the false belief people are gonna have before they get to the end where they're gonna buy your product. And I was like, please, can we sell this? Can we do something? And I know the business, I'm not looking for that. And finally I said, look, John, people need these Childers chunks. Like that's how I learned how to sell. If I could give these people, it's gonna change everything for them. And he said, okay, Russell, how about this? I will license them to you. But you can't give them away to everybody. I don't want these in everybody's hands, but I will license them to you. And we have a license negotiation. And so I wrote him a big huge check to license it from him. And his only criteria was like, I couldn't sell it as part of the main offer. It had to be something separate, something different that only people who really, really, really wanted to learn how to close were gonna get access to. And so that's what we did.
